title: Super Mario Mash-Up: Classic Zombie Pigman
description: Restores the old Zombie Pigman model and texture for the Super Mario Mash-Up!
body:
Replaces the current modern Zombified Piglin model and Pom Pom texture with the old Zombie Pigman model and Rex texture seen in earlier versions of the [Super Mario Mash-Up](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/super-mario-mash-up)!


![Classic Zombie Pigman restored](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VfyKNmbe/images/1023927fa550f25ab24f41003f8402b2f6499e8d.png)
